failure_modes.text: Analysis paralysis can turn careful inquiry into a delay machine that never cashes out in action.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set a decision deadline that forces analysis to cash out in a recommendation; careful inquiry without a forcing function becomes delay.

failure_modes.text: Maslow's hammer can make the analyst force reality to fit a favorite framework instead of questioning the fit.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test the analytical frame against at least one alternative before committing to it; Maslow's hammer fits reality to the favorite framework.

failure_modes.text: Critical thinking fails when it becomes detachment theater that avoids judgment, accountability, and clear recommendation.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger When Critical Thinking Becomes Detachment Theater
failure_modes.mitigation: Require every critical analysis to conclude with a clear judgment, owner, and next step; detachment without accountability is theater.

premortem_questions.text: Is the worst case bad enough?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Is the worst case bad enough?

premortem_questions.text: What would you have to believe?
Are we anchoring to the outside view enough, or only protecting our inside-view story?

heuristics.text: Adopt a dialectic standard so every thesis meets an antithesis before synthesis.
Take an academic selfie before evaluating others so personal bias is visible before judgment hardens.
Prioritize the make-or-break hypotheses first so skepticism stays tied to decisions that can change the answer.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on skeptical challenge, self-audit, and anti-paralysis discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor metacognitive sprawl because the raw source already offers stronger intervention chunks around thesis challenge and self-correction.
open_questions: The second premortem item is normalized from the repeated WHTB framing rather than preserved as a fully spelled-out quote to keep the chunk reusable.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on systems-thinking and scientific-method-evidence-testing as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strong on confirmation-bias and expert entrenchment, but some concepts remain broader than the current clean target-id surface.
structured_tensions: The source is tension-real on confirmation-bias and authority-driven premature certainty, even without an explicit structured tension block.
